description: LWC - A Blazing Fast, Enterprise-Grade Web Components Foundation

A blazing-fast, ultra-lightweight command launcher inspired by Raycast. Built for maximum productivity with zero bloat. Launch apps, execute scripts, and automate your workflow instantlyall with a minimal RAM and CPU footprint.
A blazing-fast, vim-slick, eye-friendly YouTube TUI written in Rust. Search, manage, and stream your favorite content directly from the terminal!

Mandelbrot CLI: Renderer with Perturbation Theory. The high-precision reference trajectory is computed exactly once, enabling blazing-fast math for billions of pixels using hardware-native double registers (with a 1e-308 hardware limit). Revolutionary Reference Reset to Zero implementation.
The ultimate contextual AI engine. Blazing-fast RAG pipelines, generative UI, and multi-model fallback routing built on FastAPI & React.
Blazing-fast static analysis CLI for security, dependency, and performance audits.
Blazing fast music streaming aggregator for Spotify, SoundCloud, Deezer and others. Written in Go. gRPC streaming, Lyrics sync, No-Ads, Low memory usage.
Blazingly fast, schema based human-readable serialization crate for the bevy engine.
Blazing-fast, keyboard-driven terminal overlay to search and recall past clips.
A blazingly fast modern minecraft launcher based on egui
Avenx.js is a compiler-driven, blazingly fast JavaScript framework with proxy-based reactivity.
A blazingly fast K8s log & event timeline TUI. Drops into K9s or runs standalone. Features chronological event interleaving & interactive JSON trees.
SArixa is a blazing-fast, 100% secure Image to PDF converter. Built entirely with HTML, CSS, and JS. All processing happens in your browser, so no files are ever uploaded to a server.
A blazing-fast Go CLI extension and interactive TUI for git branch management with fuzzy search and live GitHub PR statuses.
A blazing-fast image deduplication tool built in Rust. It uses perceptual hashing (pHash) and multi-threading to find identical or visually similar images across massive directories.
A blazing-fast macOS JSON tree viewer written in Rust. Navigate and search massive JSON files without the memory overhead of traditional editors.
"J.A.R.V.I.S: A blazing-fast, emotionally intelligent AI desktop assistant with real-time web search and PC automation capabilities."
A blazing-fast, lightweight FHIR server written in Go.

A production-ready Python development environment template using modern tools: uv for blazing-fast package management, Ruff for lightning-fast linting and formatting, ty for fast and reliable type checking, and VSCode Dev Containers for reproducible development environments.

Blazing-fast Rust CLI for synchronized video watching - no account, no app, just one command. CRDT sync engine, P2P-first, WebSocket signaling. Built for FIFA World Cup 2026 and every big moment after.
A fully-featured and blazing-fast Python API client to interact with Algolia.
A minimal, blazing-fast, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator in Rust  built to run Claude Code. Lighter & faster than ghostty.
Blazing fast Azure CLI, written in Rust
Explore genomes in the terminal. Light, blazing fast , vim-motion.
JeTTY  a blazing-fast GPU-accelerated center-summon terminal in Rust (Yakuake-style F9, beloved themes, X11 & Wayland). Collaborators wanted!
Blazing fast code analysis tool with tons of customization options.
Oxiterm is a blazing-fast, memory-safe, cross-platform terminal emulator  built from the ground up in Rust.
A blazing-fast Python CLI that aggregates entire codebases into a single, clean text file optimized for Large Language Models (LLMs).
A blazingly-fast, ux-first simplicity development framework.
A blazing-fast, local-first, open-source clipboard manager for macOS  the upper-compatible successor to Paste, free under MIT. Spotlight + bottom strip + notch-hover triad.
A blazing fast & offline frontend code editor
A utility program for sorting music files based on metadata, blazing fast written in rust
Blazing fast, instant realtime GraphQL APIs on all your data with fine grained access control, also trigger webhooks on database events.
Blazingly fast solver for FEM beam calculations, written in Rust
A simple and BLAZINGLY fast CI/CD in the making
Salesforce Apex debug log analyzer for VS Code - blazing-fast: flame charts, SOQL/DML, Apex insights & more

A blazingly fast, Rust-based CLI utility that seamlessly navigates your Git history to instantly recover lost files, deleted functions, or overwritten code blocks without needing to manually checkout older commits. Think of it as a time machine for your local repository.
A Blazingly fast Balatro Engine written in Rust
Blazingly Fast  runtime environment for Lua
GoScrapy: Harnessing Go's perfomance for blazingly fast web scraping, inspired by Python's Scrapy framework.
A blazingly fast easy to use dotfile and global theme manager written in Rust
A fully-featured and blazing-fast JavaScript API client to interact with Algolia.
A lightweight, blazing-fast desktop utility built with Tauri and React to instantly access and paste your frequently used permanent texts, snippets, and commands using system-wide shortcuts.
Blazing-fast mission control for agent skills.
Lightweight, blazing-fast CLI tool written in C designed to parse the output of the standard tree command
Plain text, powerful docs - A blazing-fast UTF-8 document processor written in Rust
Blazing fast TUI download manager built in Go for power users
A blazingly fast fuzzy tab picker for kitty terminal written in pure C
A blazingly fast AI proxy gateway.
Scan thousands of stocks in real time. Filter by RSI, MACD, volume, and more  live WebSocket updates, instant alerts, and a blazing-fast React UI. Built with FastAPI + Kafka + Redis.
Streamline JSON data access with Blazing.Json.JSONPath, a fast and compliant library for querying JSON documents effortlessly.
Toxic-MD  Lightning-fast WhatsApp bot. Multi-device. CommonJS. Blazing IPC startup.
Blazingly fast static configuration analyzer ISC KEA DHCP for version 3.x.x, written in Rust!
Blazing fast, simple and complete solution for micro frontends.

UniOCR - Unified multilingual OCR service. Supports PaddleOCR / Apple Vision engines with deep MLX-VLM neural network hardware acceleration. A blazing-fast, local-first API for enterprise AI workflows (n8n/Bob).
Full-stack Rust framework with CLI code generation, interactive REPL,   database migrations, background jobs, and event system. Blazingly fast.
Blazing-Fast Bioinformatic Operations on Python DataFrames
Blazingly fast interpolated LUT generator and applicator for arbitrary and popular color palettes.

Glyph is a blazingly fast, minimalist text editor built from the ground up in Rust. It bypasses the bloat of Electron-based editors by utilizing a custom Sovereign Skia Rendering Engine, delivering zero-latency feedback and architectural clarity.
Shotit is a screenshot-to-video search engine tailored for TV & Film, blazing-fast and compute-efficient.
A blazing-fast terminal music player and mpv-based music library browser with fuzzy search, metadata previews, and zero background daemons.
A blazing fast build tool for Esp32, Teensy, Avr, Nrf, Raspberri PI, Stm, Mgm240 and more.
A lightweight and blazing-fast WhatsApp bot powered by Baileys, featuring AI Rich-style responses, TypeScript/JavaScript support, and compatibility with both npm and Bun.
A blazing-fast Rust tokenizer for Byte Pair Encoding (BPE), a fundamental building block of modern LLMs that converts text into tokensfeaturing Python bindings for training, encoding, and decoding.
Speed up your email workflow with a local IMAP mirror. Built in Rust with PostgreSQL, Redis, and S3-compatible storage for blazing-fast caching and search.
A clean and modern setup for blazing-fast TypeScript development.
Foundry is a blazing fast, portable and modular toolkit for Ethereum application development written in Rust.
A blazing fast, type-safe library for working with JSON in Swift

The Fastest Unified Package Manager for Arch Linux + All Language Runtimes  OMG is a next-generation package manager designed for 2026 standards. It eliminates the friction of switching between pacman, yay, nvm, pyenv, and rustup by unifying them into a single, blazing-fast, Rust-native binary.
A modern, native, and blazing-fast desktop application to manage your Docker environments.
Blazingly fast code intelligence that gives AI agents compiler-grade understanding of your codebase
A blazing-fast, high-performance HTML parser and DOM manipulation library for Node.js, written in Rust. Inspired by cheerio.
Blazing fast framework for roblox based on ByteNet
A blazing fast, 100% native macOS email client for Gmail and Google Calendar. Built with Swift, SwiftUI, and local SQLite caching.
A blazing-fast PostgreSQL client built in Rust. No Electron. No JVM. No bloat.

A premium, high-performance web application for curated movie and series collections. Built with a modern tech stack focused on blazing-fast performance, stunning aesthetics, and a dynamic user experience.
A blazingly fast, lightweight input remapper for Linux written in Rust.
A Flutter plugin bridging the Rust-based Typst engine natively to Dart. Embed the compiler to generate blazing-fast PDFs and interactive previews on mobile and desktop.
A lightweight, blazing fast, and fully open-source web browser powered by LibGX. Redefining your browsing experience.
A blazing fast equality comparison, either shallow or deep
A simple, configurable, blazingly fast noise library built for and with Bevy.

A blazing-fast, decentralized device ecosystem. Connect an unlimited number of macOS, Android, Windows, and Linux machines to securely relay clipboards, files, and system states over your local network.

A blazing-fast, secure download manager for Windows, macOS,          + and Linux. Supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, BitTorrent, cloud storage          +  (AWS S3, Alibaba Cloud), and private protocols (Thunder,          + QQDL). Features multi-threaded downloads, encrypted          + credentials, and resume support. Open source C++ application.
The all-purpose KV store: blazing fast and reliably durable, scaling from tiny embedded cache to large-scale distributed database
Blazing fast LLMs API Gateway written in Go
godspeed. A blazing-fast, open-source download manager. Multi-segment parallel downloads, resume, queueing, HLS video capture, and a browser extension  Rust engine, Flutter UI.

Portfolio of Urva Gandhi - Full-Stack Developer & ML Enthusiast. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS & Framer Motion. Highlights hackathon wins, 150+ LeetCode solutions, and projects in AI, finance & healthcare. Features dark mode, smooth animations, responsive design, and modern glassmorphism aesthetics. Production-ready & blazing fast.
Protocol Buffer migrations done right - AST-aware, safe, and blazing fast
A blazing fast deep object copier
A local-first, blazing-fast LaTeX studio. Pull a proof.
Foxi is an Astro theme crafted with Tailwind CSS, designed for blazing-fast performance and seamless user experience. Perfect for creating modern, responsive SaaS websites with minimal effort.
A blazing fast file watcher CLI built in Rust. Watches any folder and runs any command when files change. Works with every language and framework.
A lightweight, blazing-fast SOCKS5 proxy failover tool written in V

Blazing-fast project and session switching for tmux, powered by fzf
A blazing-fast, Rust-based code analysis CLI powered by tree-sitter. Analyze code structure, track dependencies, and explore call graphs across multiple languages. Optimized for AI coding agents
Robust & blazingly fast NVR suite for residential and small business use, with AI integration.

BoringCode is a work-in-progress tool written in C and C++ designed for collecting x86/x64 program execution traces using DynamoRIO Instrumentation and analysing them in an intuitive and blazing-fast environment
